titleStmt.title: SII 40.286: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 286. (A.R. No. B. 331 of 1933.) Peddamakkena, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up opposite to the temple of Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1339, Hēmaḷaṁbi. Chaitra, śu. 7, Thursday, Mēsha-Saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1417 A.D., March 25.

Records the gift of several incomes of the village Pedamakkena near Kūrapāḍu in Kōṭabhūmi to the temple of Amarēśvara, the lord of Dhānyavāṭipura by Kōmaṭa-Reḍḍi Tippāya-Reḍḍi, for the merit of his father Māchaya-Reḍḍi and of his other ancestors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1339 A
gunēṁṭi hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsara ce(cai)
tra śu 7 gu mēṣa saṁkrāṁtti puṇya
kālamaṁdu śrī dhānyavāṭi puravarādhī
śvaruṁḍaina Amarēśvara śrīmanmahādē
varaku svasti praśasti sahitulaina kōma
ṭreḍḍi tippāyareḍḍiṁgāru tamada
mācayareḍḍiṁgārikiṁ nityama
pi tāḷlakuṁnu Akṣaya su
kṛtamugānu Ūrukōṭabhū
milōnu kūravāṭi baṭṭipe
damakkanasavvāyālu sahitaṁ
Aṣṭabhōgaiśvaryamugānu I
stimi Ī dharmmamu pāliṁcina vā
ru sakalamaina sukṛtālānuṁ bo
ṁdinavāru Ī dharmmamu cāgiṁpani
vāru paṁcamahāpātakamulu
sēsinavāru peddakoḍuku kapālā
lonaṁ guḍicinavāru Adigā
na Ī dharmmaṁ cā(sā)giṁci sakalamaina
sukṛtālānuṁ boṁdiḍidi . sva
dattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . maṁgaḷama
hā śrī śrīṁ jēyun . liṁgāya bha
ṭlu ceppaṁgānu brāmmacāri likhiṁ
ceḍni .
Digital edition of SII 40.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
